cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.19)

# Import Rust workspace as CMake targets
corrosion_import_crate(MANIFEST_PATH ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Cargo.toml)

# Expose include directories for generated C headers
# These headers are generated by cbindgen during `cargo build`

# krkr2-crypto: MD5 + Random
set(KRKR2_CRYPTO_INCLUDE_DIR ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/krkr2-crypto/include
    CACHE PATH "Include path for krkr2-crypto C headers")

# krkr2-fft: Real FFT
set(KRKR2_FFT_INCLUDE_DIR ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/krkr2-fft/include
    CACHE PATH "Include path for krkr2-fft C headers")
